steps.title: Convert the percentages
steps.content:
The first statement gives:
$$
a=\frac{4{,}200}{100}c=42c
$$
The second statement gives:
$$
c=\frac{25}{100}b=0.25b
$$

steps.title: Write both in terms of c
steps.content:
From $c=0.25b$, solve for $b$:
$$
b=\frac{c}{0.25}=4c
$$
So $a=42c$ and $b=4c$.

steps.title: Find the coefficient
steps.content: Substitute into $a-b=wc$: $$ 42c-4c=wc $$ $$ 38c=wc $$ Since $c$ is positive, $w=38$. The answer is 38.
